description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised and extended backward in a dramatic pose. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, with simple, closed-toe shoes. The facial features are stylized, and the hair is parted in the middle, falling to about shoulder length. The arms are unusually elongated and bent at sharp angles, creating a striking visual effect that is not typical of natural human posture. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian, but the exaggerated arm pose gives the figure a unique and somewhat surreal quality.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian standing upright with both arms dramatically extended backward, wearing a sleeveless top and straight pants. The figure has shoulder-length hair and a casual, everyday appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised and extended backward in a V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted top, and the extreme backward extension of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top, and the arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the straight pants, and the backward-bent arms from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms extended backward
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length straight hair with center part
